title: Amtech B0230 8" (200mm) Superior Combination Plier
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE: This superior combination plier is made from drop forged, heat treated steel
SAFE TO USE: It has heavy duty PVC handles with slip guards for added safety
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
COMPACT DESIGN: Versatile tool for carpentry, assembly, and general household repairs.
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains Plier See more
